verdict.answer_first: B states the first action immediately: "**Aurora: take a manual snapshot now.**" A starts with a summary of the plan: "the practical work is layers 2–6 above...".
verdict.decisiveness: B commits to a full, phased plan: "**Phase 0 — Stop the bleeding (today, ~15 min)**". A just lists categories of work: "extend retention and take a snapshot now, add encrypted off-account `pg_dump` copies...".
verdict.actionability: B provides immediate, copy-pasteable CLI commands. A explicitly states "I can't execute any of that from this session" and asks for access before providing any commands.
